summary: iter184 Guest Concierge Mobile App Extensions - comprehensive testing complete. All 42 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully verified: IRD menu/order/tracker with 4-stage Domino's-style progress, VIP WOW add-ons (20 items with diamond tier), Weather alternatives (rain plan), Venue menus with allergens, Reservations, and Group Events backend. All new quick action cards (qa-ird, qa-vip, qa-weather, qa-venues) working. No regressions on existing features (valet, luggage, transport, nearby, requests, sign out).
test_credentials: Guest: room=1208, last=Reed (William Reed, diamond tier). ADMIN_API_TOKEN=TsjvVFDCvoa4sG4wcVY7ZKF0D7LmA25lTer4edByo5o
seed_data_creation: Used seeded IRD menu (15 items), VIP addons (20 items), venues (6), nearby (3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter184 fully tested. New features: IRD (In-Room Dining) with Domino's-style 4-stage tracker (received→preparing→on-the-way→delivered), VIP WOW add-ons (20 curated experiences), Weather alternatives (rain plan with indoor venues), Venue menus with allergens, Reservations via prompt flow, Group Events backend (no frontend yet). Admin can advance IRD stages via POST /api/guest-concierge/admin/in-room-dining/order/{id}/advance. Group Events uses planner_token for co-editing and attendee_code for read-only access.
